headline: Albemarle Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) reported a sharply stronger start to 2026, with management citing higher lithium pricing, increased volumes and cost improvements across its energy storage and specialties businesses. On the company’s first-quarter earnings call, Chief Executive Officer Kent Masters said Albema
